allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('main',''\), d.get\('module',''\), d.get\('type',''\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('./node_modules/animejs/dist/modules/index.js'\).then\(m => { const s = m.stagger; console.log\(typeof s, s.toString\(\).slice\(0,300\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./node_modules/animejs/dist/modules/index.js'\).then\(m => { const a = m.animate; console.log\(typeof a\); const dummy = {}; try { const ret = a\([], {translateY: 0}\); console.log\('Methods:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(ret\)\).filter\(k => typeof ret[k]==='function'\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('err:', e.message\); } }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./node_modules/animejs/dist/modules/index.js'\).then\(m => { const doc = {createElement: \(\)=>\({style:{}, setAttribute:\(\)=>{}}\)}; const el = {style:{transform:'', opacity:''}, setAttribute:\(\)=>{}}; try { const ret = m.animate\([el], {translateY: [-10,10], duration:1000, loop:true}\); console.log\('All keys:', Object.keys\(ret\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('err:', e.message, e.stack?.split\('\\n'\)[1]\); } }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./node_modules/animejs/dist/modules/index.js'\).then\(m => { console.log\('svg:', typeof m.svg, Object.keys\(m.svg || {}\)\); console.log\('utils:', typeof m.utils, Object.keys\(m.utils || {}\).slice\(0,8\)\); console.log\('createTimeline:', typeof m.createTimeline\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('./node_modules/animejs/dist/modules/index.js'\).then\(m => { console.log\('utils keys:', Object.keys\(m.utils\)\); console.log\('random:', typeof m.random\); }\)")
